purpose: Track current operational focus, completed artifacts, blockers, and next best action for Command Center UI.
current_focus: Bug bounty lab readiness confirmed: the local runtime completed a safe Kali WSL inventory and security_core_plan check, proved Kali reachability, and recorded a receipt without live external scanning.

blocked_items.summary: OpenRouter paid or auto-routed models may return 402 Payment Required, but the runtime now falls through to a strong free-model candidate chain and the trading advisor has a separate faster free model.
blocked_items.next_step: Use the free default model chain for agents and the fast free trading-advisor model; enable billing only when explicitly choosing paid models.

blocked_items.summary: Supabase production queue is not configured; runtime uses local SQLite.
blocked_items.next_step: Add SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY locally when ready.

blocked_items.summary: Binance Spot Testnet credentials are not configured; live execution remains disabled.
blocked_items.next_step: Add Testnet API key and secret locally, then validate before enabling execution.

blocked_items.summary: Cursor Agent local auth and Docker daemon are partial.
blocked_items.next_step: Operator login/startup required only when those agents are needed.

latest_receipts.summary: Bug bounty lab readiness check completed: Kali WSL reachable, nmap/nuclei/httpx/subfinder/git/python3 present, security_core_plan executed without live scanning, and UTF-8 subprocess output fix added.

FATHIYA completed a knowledge-understanding session over the awareness/security learning cards, evals, runtime map, and boundary profile; reviewed proof recorded in receipt-2026-06-14-fathiya-knowledge-understanding-v1.
Knowledge-only proof retrieved the imported corpus manifest, comprehension map, registry, and policy layer with no execution tool steps.
Runtime retrieved awareness/security manifest plus imported raw corpus sources and completed a read-only comprehension run.
Runtime retrieved core FATHIYA operating-system sources and completed the agent comprehension bootstrap check.

active_agents.role: local queue, worker, tool execution, receipts
semantic retrieval and local bounded synthesis

blockers: Operator boundary profile is pending; sensitive or state-changing actions should be recorded as boundary_pending until the operator defines them
OpenRouter billing/credits only for explicitly selected paid models; free fallback routing and fast free trading advisory are active
Supabase service credentials for production queue
Binance Spot Testnet API key/secret for testnet validation

next_recommended_action: Use the ready Kali-backed bug bounty lab for local planning and owned-scope preparation; define target scope and operator boundaries before any live testing.
